issues.message: Repeated type assertion data as Record<string, unknown> across four private parse functions violates no-type-assertions guideline
issues.suggestion: Extract a shared helper that validates and narrows the response data type

issues.message: Meta field equality uses JSON.stringify which is key-order sensitive - semantically identical objects with different insertion order reported as changed
issues.suggestion: Use a deterministic deep-equality helper instead of JSON.stringify

issues.message: Orphan-feature detection computes orphanFeatures but the if-body is empty - dead code adding cognitive overhead
issues.suggestion: Remove the dead code block or wire up an actual warning

issues.message: Orphaned JSDoc block intended for parseArgs sits above runCli function instead
issues.suggestion: Move JSDoc to correct function or remove if not needed
issues.evidence: /** Parses CLI arguments... */ export async function runCli()

issues.message: Version string 2.0.0 is hardcoded and will silently diverge from package.json after release bumps
issues.suggestion: Read version from package.json at build or runtime

issues.message: phaseRaw narrowed via includes check then immediately re-asserted with as TaskPhase - redundant type assertion
issues.suggestion: Use a proper type guard function instead of type assertion

issues.message: statusRaw uses same double-assertion pattern - isTaskStatus type guard exists in parser.ts but not shared
issues.suggestion: Reuse the existing isTaskStatus type guard from parser.ts

issues.message: Stub MCP server module has no documentation explaining planned tool interface or tracking ticket
issues.suggestion: Add module header with feature ticket reference and planned interface

issues.message: No module header explaining relationship between Zod schemas and parallel TypeScript types in types.ts
issues.suggestion: Add brief module doc explaining schema/type relationship

issues.message: formatSuggestion uses chain of if statements on field name strings instead of typed lookup map
issues.suggestion: Replace if-chain with a typed Record lookup

issues.message: epicIds Set built solely for dead orphan filter - can be removed with the dead code
issues.suggestion: Remove alongside the dead orphan-feature block

issues.message: No test for duplicate feature IDs across multiple epics - indexFeatures silently overwrites on ID collision
issues.suggestion: Add test case for duplicate feature ID across epics
